name: Goblin Incursion
rewards: crude blades; a scout's scratched map; goblin-iron scraps
flavorIntro: A raiding party in scavenged mail, pressing down from the high ground. They move with more coordination than you expected.
designNote: Rung 1 — teaches potency. Two failure modes: bad food = death (drain overwhelms below Initiate); Initiate food without draught = stalemate (armor wall, timeout). Initiate food + entry potency draught = T3 win (~74%). Validated at band Lv5, 5000 runs, FL5 role-matched food.

greycloaks.name: Goblin Raiders on the East Road
greycloaks.flavorIntro: A goblin warband has come down from the hills and is working the stretch of road east of Weathertop. They have been raiding for days. Your band intercepts them at dusk.

mithlost.name: Goblin Scouts at the Forest Margin
mithlost.region: the Ered Luin, western woodland edge
mithlost.flavorIntro: Goblins probing down from the mountain passes above Celondim. They have been watching the tree-line for three nights. They are armored in scavenged plate — not the rabble you expected.

undermarch.name: Goblin Assault on the Outer Gate
undermarch.region: the Blue Mountains, Thorin's Halls approach
undermarch.flavorIntro: Mountain goblins, mail-clad and organized, hit the outer approach to Thorin's Halls before dawn. Not a raid — a test of the defenses. Your band answers the alarm.

kingswake.name: Goblin Incursion
kingswake.flavorIntro: A raiding party in scavenged mail, pressing down from the high ground. They move with more coordination than you expected.
